def positive_python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_extra_fields_computed_before_sampling():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_extra_fields_computed_before_sampling"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag expensive log extra fields computed before sampling or level filters."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
